title: Replace --merged check with tree-equivalence in branch cleanup policy + add automation script
goal: Fix the post-merge branch cleanup policy mismatch with squash-merge workflow by replacing git's --merged ancestor check with a tree-equivalence diff check, add a safe automation script, and clean up the five orphan task branches that accumulated under the old policy.

include: task ledger, session log, report, quality score, CURRENT_STATE
exclude: Other authority documents not directly related to branch cleanup

success_criteria: git-branch-policy.md Post-merge Branch Cleanup section requires `git diff main..task/{ID} --quiet` (tree equivalence) before deletion, replacing the prior reliance on `git branch --merged main`.
scripts/clean-merged-task-branches.mjs exists and supports --dry-run, --force, --branch <name> options. Default: dry-run report.
Script refuses to delete branches where `git diff main..<branch> --quiet` exits non-zero (unique work present).
Script refuses to delete the currently checked-out branch and `main`.
package.json exposes the script as `npm run clean:branches`.

Five orphan branches (task/TASK-20260427-092, task/TASK-20260428-001, task/TASK-20260428-002, task/TASK-20260428-004, task/TASK-20260428-005) are removed using the new script after tree-equivalence verification.
TASK-20260428-006 ledger has TASK_CREATED, INSTRUCTION_SENT, GENERATION_COMPLETED, VALIDATION_RESULT, REPORT_WRITTEN, MERGE_COMPLETED, TASK_COMPLETED with insight_capture.
reports/TASK-20260428-006.md exists with Executive Summary, validation results, branch cleanup outcome.
logs/quality-scores.jsonl has a row for TASK-20260428-006.
CURRENT_STATE.md `마지막 갱신` and `활성 Task` reflect this Task.
task/TASK-20260428-006 itself is removed by the new script after main merge + push.

positive: Use only Node.js built-ins (no new npm dependencies).
Default behavior must be dry-run; deletion requires explicit --force flag.
Log every checked branch with its tree-diff outcome.
Record command shape and outcome in the task ledger.
negative: Do not include secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not modify other authority documents in the same Task.
Do not delete the current checked-out branch or main.
Do not push or modify origin remote branches.
